    Methods in Controllers with parameters of type Reservation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    SubscriberController.showCancellationPopup(Reservation res)
    Displays a popup alert for a cancelled reservation and notifies the server that the subscriber has been informed.
    private void
    SubscriberController.showPaymentReminderPopup(Reservation res)
    Displays a reminder popup for a reservation that has been seated for over 2 hours and hasn't been paid.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    SubscriberController.onReservationsReceived(List<Reservation> reservations)
    Handles reservations received from the server.
    abstract void
    BaseDisplayController.showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
    Called when a list of reservations is received.
    void
    CancelReservationController.showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
    Displays a list of confirmed reservations in the table.
    void
    CurrentDinersController.showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
    Filters and displays only the reservations with status ReservationStatus.SEATED.
    void
    GuestCancelReservationController.showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
    Displays a list of reservations.
    void
    GuestWaitingListController.showReservations(List<Reservation> reservations)

    Displays a list of confirmed reservations in the table.

    Not used in this screen.
    void
    TableReceivingSubscriberController.showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
    Displays today's confirmed reservations in the table.

  • Uses of Reservation in DAO

    Methods in DAO that return Reservation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Reservation
    ReservationDAO.GetReservation(int ReservationId)
    Retrieves a single reservation by its unique ID.
    Reservation
    TableDAO.GetReservation(int ReservationId)
    Retrieves a full Reservation entity by its unique ID.
    private Reservation
    TableDAO.mapResultSetToReservation(ResultSet rs)
    Helper method to map a single row from a ResultSet into a Reservation object. * @param rs The ResultSet positioned at the desired row.
    Methods in DAO that return types with arguments of type Reservation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Reservation>
    TableDAO.getAffectedReservations(int tableId, int newCapacity, boolean isDeletion)
    Identifies reservations assigned to a specific table that can no longer exist due to table deletion or a reduction in seating capacity. * @param tableId The ID of the modified table.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.GetAllUserReservations(User user)
    Retrieves all reservations made by a specific User object.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.getConfirmedReservationsAt(LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
    Filters confirmed reservations for a specific date and time.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.getReservationsAt(LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
    Retrieves reservations that are active (CONFIRMED, PENDING, or SEATED) at a specific timestamp.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.getReservationsByCustomer(int customerId)
    Retrieves the full reservation history for a specific customer.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.getReservationsByDate(LocalDate date)
    Retrieves all non-cancelled reservations for a given date.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.getReservationsByDay(Day day)
    Retrieves reservations based on the day of the week.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.getReservationsOverlapping(LocalDate date, LocalTime startTime, int durationHours)
    Checks for reservations that overlap with a proposed new booking period.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.readAllReservations()
    Reads every reservation record in the database.
    Methods in DAO with parameters of type Reservation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ReservationDAO.insertReservation(Reservation r)
    Inserts a new reservation and retrieves its auto-generated ID.
    boolean
    ReservationDAO.updateReservation(Reservation reservation)
    Updates an existing reservation's details in the database.
